title: Cobblemon: Creatified
description: Cobblemons poke ball system broken down into a more complicated, Create centric system. Fully complete with 3D Balls, Ball parts, & materials. Also adds in a Battle Tower system initiated via trial spawner, as well as a slew of various pokemon items.
body:
Cobblemon Creatified is an expansion mod that bridges Cobblemon and Create, introducing a fully integrated Poke Ball crafting pipeline and a wide suite of progression, utility, and endgame features.

 
# Updated for Cobblemon 1.7.0!
 




# Pokeball Crafting Flows



Apricorns are broken into new material tiers and processed through Create machines, allowing you to automate and scale Poke Ball production. These refined apricorn materials combine with Poke Ball parts, all of which have 3d models, to craft colored and higher-tier balls. All using the familiar Create workflow.



With these changes, we've overhauled the Poke Ball crafting recipes to make them progression based. All within the Create ecosystem. Balls are now crafted based on their tier. Tier 1 Poke Balls are used to make Tier 2 Balls, Tier 2 Balls to make Tier 3, and so on. This gives lower tier Poke Balls a place in the average players earlygame gameplay and keeps them semi-relevant into late game.





Alongside this crafting overhaul, the mod adds powerful items that allow deeper interaction with your pokemon:




# NEW ITEMS
### Epic Candy 
Instantly raise a pokemon’s level by 100.
Obtained by crafting using either Create or Cobblemon's cooking pot!
Also extremely rarely seen as a drop from grinding up scrap balls or an Epic reward from the Trial Tower.
### Innert Shiny Token 
An Innert version of the Shiny Token. Release or defeat 10 wild shiny pokemon to activate.
Obtained as a very rare drop from Legendary Prize Boxes as a reward from the Trial Tower.
### Shiny Token 
Make your pokemon permanently shiny!
Only obtainable via Innert Shiny Token.
### Silver Bottlecaps 
Raises a chosen stat’s IV to 31 for one of your pokemon! A Silver Bottlecap exists for every stat.
Obtained as a rare drop from Epic Prize Boxes as a reward from the Trial Tower.
### Gold Bottlecap 
Raises ALL of a chosen pokemons IV's to 31!
Obtained as a drop from Legendary Prize Boxes as a reward from the Trial Tower.
### Mystery TM 
Teaches a pokemon a random move from its legal movepool. Includes egg and tutor moves.
Obtained extremely rarely from grinding up Scrap Balls.
### Move Index  
Teaches a pokemon every possible legal move available to it. Includes egg and tutor moves.
Obtained very rarely from Legendary Prize Boxes as a reward from the Trial Tower.
### Ball Swapper Token 
Replace your pokemon's current pokeball with another of your choice.
Craft the token with a pokeball of your choice to set the swapper.
*This will overwrite your pokemons current ball. Does not refund the current ball.
Obtained as a reward from Epic Prize Boxes as a reward from the Trial Tower.
### Gender Swap Token 
Swaps your pokemon's current gender between either Male or Female.
*Does not effect genderless pokemon.
Obtained rarely from Rare Prize Boxes as a reward from the Trial Tower

Alternatively, if you're like me and want to have Cobblemon in the pack but have players who never want to see them:

### Repel 
Place it as a block or equip it as a Curio.
When active, it prevents all pokemon spawns in a radius around itself, or entirely around your player.
If FTB Chunks is installed, the Repel respects other players’ claims and will not suppress spawns inside land someone else owns.
Craftable!





# THE TRIAL TOWER

Cobblemon’s late game can feel empty, so we added a full Battle Tower–style progression system.



The "Trial Tower" system, as we call it, is initiated by right clicking a Trial Spawner with a Masterball. The Masterball will be inserted and begin to power it, changing it into the Trial Tower. To begin your climb you will need a Tower Key, which is attainable via Create's crafting system - requiring a new material rarely found by grinding up Scrap Balls which are created from Tier 4 poke balls. Simply right click the key into the Trial block and begin your ascent!



The Trial Tower awards the player with points for every battle defeated. As you climb, the battles will get progressively more difficult, increasing the opponents pokemon levels passed what is typically attainable! Each floor yields more and more rewards, until the player is defeated.



Upon defeat, the Tower will cash out all of the players rewards and gift them with Tower Prize Boxes of varying qualities that yield various pokemon related loot!



### 
### 
### ⚠️ Development Status

This mod is in very early development.
Consider this a public beta while we expand and refine the feature set.



### Textures By
- The Cobblemon Team
- Malcomriley
- Mauriece
### Pokeball Models & Various Particle Effects By
- The Cobblemon Team
